---
title: "Ben Sylvester’s Word. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “The Railroad Children,” &c."
---

## Ben Sylvester’s Word. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “The Railroad Children,” &c.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1856
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Booklet

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6, Paternoster Row, London. Masters and Co., 78, New Bond Street, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
